ddls:
CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner or responsible entity for the object */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the object */,
  "last_known_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last known location of the object */,
  "last_known_status" TEXT /* Last known status of the object */,
  "last_known_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last known status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_last_known_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_known_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_object_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_type_id") REFERENCES object_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the object type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object type */,
  "max_size" REAL /* Maximum size of the object type */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight of the object type */,
  "standard_color" INTEGER /* Standard color code for the object type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position record */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being tracked */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the position record */,
  "position_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the object's position */,
  "position_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the object's position */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the object */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the object */,
  "color" INTEGER /* Color code of the object */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the object is currently positioned */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the object */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the object */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the position data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_positions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_positions_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_locations" (
  "object_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object-location mapping */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the location update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the object at the location */,
  "expected_arrival_time" TEXT /* Expected arrival time at the location */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time at the location */,
  "expected_departure_time" TEXT /* Expected departure time from the location */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time from the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_locations_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the sensor is attached to */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sensor calibration */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sensor service */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled sensor service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_sensors_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_sensors_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value the sensor can measure */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value the sensor can measure */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data collected */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES object_sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "can_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can read the feature */,
  "can_write" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can write to the feature */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can delete the feature */,
  "can_execute" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can execute the feature */,
  "can_delegate" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can delegate permissions to others */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feature */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the feature */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_history_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_history_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was notified of the alert */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_alerts_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Timestamp of the next maintenance due date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_maintenance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_maintenance_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)
